name: Deferred - Haunting - 2
description: Second returns for ghosts, hauntings, and unresolved presences.

results.description: [body] The haunting from {origin} left you marked in body or nerve, whether by ghostly means or your own frightened flesh.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [social -1] The presence from {origin} made your behavior strange enough that others trusted your judgment less afterward.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The haunting from {origin} was quieted, if not fully explained, and the relief felt almost holy.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [body] What had haunted you since {origin} ended in collapse, fever, or bodily strain before it would loosen its hold.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [social 1] Surviving the haunting from {origin} gave you an unsettling kind of authority with the fearful.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] The old presence from {origin} faded, but left enough strangeness around your name to trouble easier minds.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [body] The haunting from {origin} ended only after it had drawn its last proof from your sleep or strength.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] What had followed you from {origin} was finally laid to rest, or else you learned at last how not to answer it.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [social -1] The haunting from {origin} cost you credibility even after it lost force over your own imagination.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [body] The old ghost or guilt from {origin} left you shaken enough that the body remembered what the mind could not settle.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [social 1] Those who knew of the haunting from {origin} afterward treated you with wary respect rather than easy dismissal.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp] The presence from {origin} was never fully explained, only endured until it weakened into memory.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [body] The haunting from {origin} left your sleep, nerves, or flesh less reliable thereafter.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The old haunting from {origin} ended by revealing just enough truth to make it tragic rather than merely terrifying.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [social -1] What followed you from {origin} made you look strange for a season and changed what certain people expected from you thereafter.
results.name: haunting-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The haunting from {origin} was not banished so much as transformed into one more dark knowledge you carried with competence.
results.name: haunting-2
